text: In this synthetic in vitro assay, osimertinib inhibited mutant EGFR with an IC50 of 12 nM, whereas gefitinib inhibited the same target with an IC50 of 38 nM. The osimertinib plasma half-life was approximately 48 h in the toy dataset.

This toy pharmacology record reports that salbutamol activated the beta-2 adrenergic receptor with an EC50 of 3.2 nM and a Ki of 1.1 nM. Reported oral bioavailability was about 50% in the synthetic example.
The cohort included 45 patients followed over 12 months with no reported potency measurement.
note: negative control: bare counts and durations are not pharmacology parameters

text: Ki determination in this toy record used 5 mg of purified protein; no potency value was reported.
note: adversarial wrong-positive: a reagent mass after a 'Ki' cue is not a binding constant

text: In this synthetic assay the IC50 was not reached at 100 nM.
note: adversarial: a value negated before it is stated must not be recorded

text: The measured IC50 came to 3 nM for the lead compound in this toy note.
note: held-out paraphrase (not a corpus copy): generalization, not recall of inputs

text: This synthetic compound showed an IC50 of <5 nM against the target.
note: relation-sensitive: < must be captured, not flattened to =
